mapper.select: SELECT id, notice_code, title, problem_description, solution, category, priority, is_active, rich_content, created_at, updated_at FROM notice_dictionary ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC

SELECT id, notice_code, title, problem_description, solution, category, priority, is_active, rich_content, created_at, updated_at FROM notice_dictionary WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC
SELECT id, notice_code, title, problem_description, solution, category, priority, is_active, rich_content, created_at, updated_at FROM notice_dictionary WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, notice_code, title, problem_description, solution, category, priority, is_active, rich_content, created_at, updated_at FROM notice_dictionary WHERE notice_code = #{noticeCode}

SELECT id, notice_code, title, problem_description, solution, category, priority, is_active, rich_content, created_at, updated_at FROM notice_dictionary WHERE category = #{category} AND is_active = true ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_dictionary ( notice_code, title, problem_description, solution, category, priority, is_active, rich_content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{noticeCode}, #{title}, #{problemDescription}, #{solution}, #{category}, #{priority}, #{isActive}, #{richContent}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_dictionary SET notice_code = #{noticeCode}, title = #{title}, problem_description = #{problemDescription}, solution = #{solution}, category = #{category}, priority = #{priority}, is_active = #{isActive}, rich_content = #{richContent}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
